Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Mark receives a finished, professional catalog file within minutes of submitting a request instead of waiting for manual fulfillment.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: What previously required a dozen people doing independent lookups is consolidated into a single automated pull, saving hours of redundant effort each week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each line of the backorder report with the live Dream inventory data and flags any parts that have no source — no stock, no order, and no incoming supply.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: The team instantly sees which backorders have a resolution path and which are truly stuck, enabling faster customer communication and purchasing decisions.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer-facing communications for backordered parts, pre-populated with live status details for each affected order.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Customer updates go out faster and more consistently, reducing inbound status calls and improving customer satisfaction without adding manual drafting time.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitments by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: A manual process that would take days of catalog browsing is completed automatically, giving DFC a comprehensive market view in one pass.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitments against DFC's existing parts catalog and outputs a structured sheet showing matches, gaps, and coverage by vehicle.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Dino gets a clear, actionable gap analysis showing exactly where DFC has opportunity to expand its two-piece rotor offering.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers or prospects to gather demand data for two-piece rotor fitments not currently in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Demand signals are collected at scale without manual outreach effort, giving the team real data to prioritize which gaps to fill first.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy across campaigns, extracting headlines, body text, and creative descriptions for scanning.
Meta Investigation.impact: Every live ad is checked instantly rather than requiring someone to manually open and read each ad in the platform.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all collected ad copy for specified trigger phrases and flags every exact match, noting the ad ID, field name, and matching text.
Meta Investigation.impact: Compliance or quality issues are caught across the full ad library in seconds, with precise location data so nothing is ambiguous.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted flagged-copy report listing every match with the exact ad, field, and copy where each phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: The right person gets an immediately actionable report without needing platform access or running the investigation manually.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Ingests live performance data and ad content from active Meta and TikTok campaigns, making it available for conversational querying.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Team members can ask questions about paid channel performance without needing to pull reports or navigate ad platform dashboards.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Answers natural language questions about Meta and TikTok ad performance, surfacing insights, comparisons, and anomalies from the ingested campaign data.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Anyone on the team can get instant, accurate answers about paid channel performance without waiting for a analyst to pull a report.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox, detects incoming applications, and routes each email and attachment into the workflow based on whether a resume is attached.
Resume Bot.impact: No application is missed or left sitting in an unmonitored inbox, and candidates get faster responses regardless of hiring team availability.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to an organized folder in Drive, labeled by candidate name and role for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: All candidate documents are stored consistently and accessibly, replacing scattered email attachments with a clean, searchable file structure.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of open roles, produces a hire/deny/pause decision with reasoning, and drafts the appropriate auto-reply for each outcome.
Resume Bot.impact: Initial resume screening that previously took recruiter hours per batch is completed instantly and consistently, freeing human review for top candidates only.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant decision, score, and status to a Sheets dashboard, with denied and approved candidates in the main tab and paused candidates held in a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: The hiring team has a real-time, organized view of every application and its outcome without maintaining a manual tracker.

summary: The automation pipeline continues to grow strong, with 56 total agents across the portfolio — 29 completed, 10 in progress, and 17 planned. No new agents were added this week, and no agents changed stages, so the pipeline remains steady heading into the next cycle. The team's focus stays on advancing the 10 in-progress builds toward completion while the planned queue continues to represent a solid roadmap of upcoming capabilities. Great work keeping the momentum going — more updates to come as agents cross the finish line!
